is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum pfcrt gene and chloroquine resistance throughout.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Table 1 reports Pfcrt codons 72,74,75,76,97,220,271,326,356,371 and Pfmdr1 86 mentioned (86Y).

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 1 lists individual amino acid genotypes per named laboratory-adapted clone, not population frequency counts/percentages per locus per site. This is a molecular characterization of cultured lines, not a field frequency survey.

sub_country_location.evidence: Table 1 gives only country/region-level origin labels (e.g. 'Kenya', 'Mali', 'Sudan') for culture-adapted reference clones — no sub-national site, clinic, or coordinates.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: No collection years are given for the isolates; they are laboratory-adapted lines obtained from Su et al. 1997 with no sampling dates.

african_field_samples.evidence: Isolates are 'Cultured-adapted lines' (lab-adapted reference clones such as Dd2, HB3, FCB, 3D7, NF54), not fresh human field/clinical isolates; core experiments are in vitro transfection studies.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical molecular/genetics study identifying pfcrt and performing transfection experiments.

duplicate_risk.evidence: 'Cultured-adapted lines were obtained from regions of Asia, Africa, and South America (Su et al., 1997).' The reference clones (Dd2, HB3, 3D7, etc.) are standard, previously published, widely reused strains.

supplement.evidence: Supplementary data referenced are plasmid maps and gene organization, not frequency or site-level location data.

assessment.summary: This is a molecular/functional study identifying the pfcrt gene and demonstrating its role in chloroquine resistance via transfection experiments. Table 1 catalogs pfcrt codon genotypes of individual laboratory-adapted reference clones from various global regions — these are lab-adapted culture lines, not fresh African field/clinical isolates, and are presented as single-clone genotypes rather than population frequencies. No sub-national locations or collection dates are provided, and the clones are standard previously published strains.
exclusion_reasons: No extractable per-locus population frequencies (only individual clone genotypes)
No sub-country location resolution (only country/region labels)
Isolates are laboratory-adapted reference clones, not fresh African field samples
